name: Brute Abominator (M7S) - Official Adaptive Timeline
description: Phase-aware migrated adaptive timeline for Brute Abominator (M7S). Cactbot section boundaries are mapped onto the existing mitigation-focused local route so planner phase overrides can target the major deathmatch sections cleanly.

bossMetadata.name: Brute Abominator (M7S)
bossMetadata.description: The monstrous creation of Solution Nine, third boss of AAC Cruiserweight Tier (Savage).

guideSources.title: AAC Cruiserweight M3 (Savage) Raid Guide for FFXIV

analysisSources.title: cactbot M7S timeline
analysisSources.notes: Section labels seed the planner-visible phase names and ordering.

analysisSources.title: FF Logs report API docs
analysisSources.notes: Planner phase overrides follow the same fight-phase timing model used for FF Logs report analysis.

analysisSources.title: MitPlan legacy savage migration
analysisSources.notes: Actions are preserved from the existing local mitigation route and annotated with cactbot-aligned phase anchors plus skip windows.

actions.name: Brutal Impact
actions.description: 6 hits of raidwide physical damage that marks the beginning of the fight. Hit count increases by 1 on each subsequent use, up to a maximum of 8 hits.

actions.name: Smash Here
actions.description: An unmarked shared tank buster on the closest player. Requires tank swap and mitigation.

actions.name: Sinister Seeds
actions.description: The four closest or furthest players receive a marked AoE that drop Tendrils of Terror and inflicts a magic vuln. These create line AoEs extending cardinally and intercardinally.

actions.name: Impact
actions.description: Unmarked stack AoE on both healers that inflicts a magic vulnerability up debuff.

actions.name: Explosion
actions.description: Three proximity AoEs around the edges drop in sequence. Players must move around the arena to avoid them.

actions.name: Smash There
actions.description: An unmarked shared tank buster on the furthest player. Requires tank swap and mitigation.

actions.name: Pulp Smash
actions.description: Marked stack AoE on the healer. The boss jumps to the healer creating a small point-blank AoE, and all players take damage in a conal AoE that inflicts vulnerability.

actions.name: Neo Bombarian Special
actions.description: Heavy physical damage that knocks players back off the platform to the second arena.

actions.name: Brutish Swing
actions.description: The boss does an AoE based on the weapon in his hand. If he is tethered to a building, jumps to it halfway through the cast and casts it from there.

actions.name: Glower Power
actions.description: Line AoE in front of boss with unmarked circle AoEs on all players that inflicts a magic vulnerability.

actions.name: Revenge of the Vines
actions.description: Heavy raidwide magical damage that requires significant mitigation.

actions.name: Abominable Blink
actions.description: A random tank receives a proximity flare AoE marker that needs to be mitigated.

actions.name: Sporesplosion
actions.description: Three sets of circle AoEs on the floor that must be avoided.

actions.name: Brutish Swing
actions.description: The boss does an AoE based on the weapon in his hand. If he is tethered to a building, jumps to it halfway through the cast and casts it from there.

actions.name: Glower Power
actions.description: Line AoE in front of boss with unmarked circle AoEs on all players that inflicts a magic vulnerability.

actions.name: Revenge of the Vines
actions.description: Heavy raidwide magical damage that requires significant mitigation.

actions.name: Abominable Blink
actions.description: A random tank receives a proximity flare AoE marker that needs to be mitigated.

actions.name: Strange Seeds
actions.description: Four sets of two marked AoEs that drop Tendrils of Terror AoEs. Each set targets one support and one DPS.

actions.name: Killer Seeds
actions.description: Four stack marker AoEs that also drop Tendrils of Terror AoEs. Spawns on four players of one role.

actions.name: Brutish Swing
actions.description: The boss does an AoE based on the weapon in his hand. If he is tethered to a building, jumps to it halfway through the cast and casts it from there.

actions.name: Glower Power
actions.description: Line AoE in front of boss with unmarked circle AoEs on all players that inflicts a magic vulnerability.

actions.name: Revenge of the Vines
actions.description: Heavy raidwide magical damage that requires significant mitigation.

actions.name: Powerslam
actions.description: Breaks the arena dealing heavy physical damage, causing all players to plummet down into the third arena.

actions.name: Brutal Impact
actions.description: 7 hits of raidwide physical damage that requires significant mitigation.

actions.name: Brutish Swing
actions.description: The boss does an AoE based on the glowing weapon in his hand. He tethers to a wall and jumps to it halfway through the cast.

actions.name: Lashing Lariat
actions.description: Once he uses Brutish Swing, the weapon he used disappears. He will do a large line AoE from that hand's side and dash across the arena.

actions.name: Brutish Swing
actions.description: The boss does an AoE based on the remaining weapon in his hand. He tethers to a wall and jumps to it halfway through the cast.

actions.name: Glower Power
actions.description: Line AoE in front of boss with unmarked circle AoEs on all players that inflicts a magic vulnerability.

actions.name: Slaminator
actions.description: A tower in the middle of the arena. Must be soaked and deals massive damage as Brute Abombinator jumps to it. Tank invulnerability recommended.

actions.name: Smash Here
actions.description: An unmarked shared tank buster on the closest player. Requires tank swap and mitigation.

actions.name: Brutal Impact
actions.description: 8 hits of raidwide physical damage that requires significant mitigation.

actions.name: Killer Seeds
actions.description: Four stack marker AoEs that also drop Tendrils of Terror AoEs. Spawns on four players of one role.

actions.name: Sinister Seeds
actions.description: The four closest or furthest players receive a marked AoE that drop Tendrils of Terror and inflicts a magic vuln. These create line AoEs extending cardinally and intercardinally.

actions.name: Pulp Smash
actions.description: Marked stack AoE on the healer. The boss jumps to the healer creating a small point-blank AoE, and all players take damage in a conal AoE that inflicts vulnerability.

actions.name: Brutal Impact
actions.description: 8 hits of raidwide physical damage that requires significant mitigation.

actions.name: Strange Seeds
actions.description: Four sets of two marked AoEs that drop Tendrils of Terror AoEs. Each set targets one support and one DPS.

actions.name: Brutish Swing
actions.description: The boss does an AoE based on the glowing weapon in his hand. He tethers to a wall and jumps to it halfway through the cast.

actions.name: Lashing Lariat
actions.description: Once he uses Brutish Swing, the weapon he used disappears. He will do a large line AoE from that hand's side and dash across the arena.

actions.name: Brutish Swing
actions.description: The boss does an AoE based on the remaining weapon in his hand. He tethers to a wall and jumps to it halfway through the cast.

actions.name: Slaminator
actions.description: A tower in the middle of the arena. Must be soaked and deals massive damage as Brute Abombinator jumps to it. Tank invulnerability recommended.

actions.name: Smash There
actions.description: An unmarked shared tank buster on the furthest player. Requires tank swap and mitigation.

actions.name: Brutal Impact
actions.description: 8 hits of raidwide physical damage that requires significant mitigation.

actions.name: Special Bombarian Special (Enrage)
actions.description: Enrage wipe mechanic that occurs at 11:10 into the fight.

branches.label: Default Route
branches.description: Phase-aware migrated route built from the existing MitPlan action library.
